summary: Manageability Ignition-Redfish Content Plan (pptx) referenced but not directly linked to in abstract.

summary: Architectural decisions regarding PECI command execution, specifically with regards to the PECI master being set to PCH or BMC for ignition.
evidence: log entry on 9/16/2020 mentions that "Some PECI commands may work better if PECI master is set to PCH (Or BMC for ignition)"
